game_name: The Magical Quest Starring Mickey Mouse

special_mechanics.name: Magician Outfit
special_mechanics.description: Allows Mickey to shoot magic blasts at enemies. Magic blasts are larger the longer they are charged. Drains magic meter, refilled by collecting magical lamps. Grants underwater breathing and magic carpet control.

special_mechanics.name: Firefighter Uniform
special_mechanics.description: Allows Mickey to spray water streams at enemies. Water stream can put out fires, push blocks, and form icicles. Drains water meter, refilled by collecting fire hydrant items.

special_mechanics.name: Mountain-Climbing Gear
special_mechanics.description: Grants grappling hook ability to attach to certain objects, hoist/swing upward. Grappling hook can grab items and enemies for spin-throw.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article with general gameplay descriptions. No quantitative physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data) are documented in available sources. Game primarily defined by outfit system providing diverse mechanics rather than precise movement physics.
